description: Location, Location, Location! Future Skytrain Fleetwood. Amenities-rich Community And High-ranking Schools. Walk Distance To Popular Francis Park And Surrey Library, Frost Road Elementary School, Holy Cross Regional High School & Surrey Christian School, Fleetwood Secondary School. With Soft Close Drawers And Sleek Acrylic Cabinetry, Quartz Countertops. Samsung Appliances. Modern Under-mounted Sink. Glass-Framed Standing Shower. Open Concept Throughout Kitchen And Living Area. Pristine Roller Blinds. This 3-bedroom+Den corner townhouse has A Wider Floor Plan and Offers A Lot Of Natural Lighting. Could use as 4 bedrooms. 1 Secure Underground Parking Spots. 1 Storage Lockers.2-5-10 Warranty. Rooftop Amenities. Additional parking is available for a discount. GST rebate for First time buyers.
